question: Will Platinum spot price on NYMEX exceed 1000 USD/oz on May 31, 2026?
reason: Platinum spot price on NYMEX has been consistently above $1,000/oz in May 2026.
evidence: Platinum spot price on NYMEX has been consistently above $1,000/oz in May 2026.
Zimbabwe's export ban on raw minerals, including platinum, has been in effect since February 2026.
The export ban aims to promote local beneficiation and value addition, potentially reducing global supply.
